query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_device_tag (
    device_id   INT NOT NULL,
    tag_id      INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (device_id, tag_id),
    KEY fk_bdt_tag (tag_id),
    KEY fk_bdt_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bdt_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bdt_tag    FOREIGN KEY (tag_id)    REFERENCES dim_tag(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bdt_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_device_device_group (
    device_id       INT NOT NULL,
    device_group_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at     DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (device_id, device_group_id),
    KEY fk_bddg_group (device_group_id),
    KEY fk_bddg_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id)       REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_group  FOREIGN KEY (device_group_id) REFERENCES dim_device_group(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)           REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_application (
    alert_id       INT NOT NULL,
    application_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id         BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at    DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, application_id),
    KEY fk_baa_app (application_id),
    KEY fk_baa_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_alert FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)       REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_app   FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES dim_application(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_raw   FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)          REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_device (
    alert_id    INT NOT NULL,
    device_id   INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, device_id),
    KEY fk_bad_device (device_id),
    KEY fk_bad_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_alert  FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)  REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_device_group (
    alert_id        INT NOT NULL,
    device_group_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at     DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, device_group_id),
    KEY fk_badg_group (device_group_id),
    KEY fk_badg_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_alert FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)        REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_group FOREIGN KEY (device_group_id) REFERENCES dim_device_group(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_raw   FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)           REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_network (
    alert_id    INT NOT NULL,
    network_id  INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, network_id),
    KEY fk_ban_network (network_id),
    KEY fk_ban_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_alert   FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)   REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_network FOREIGN KEY (network_id) REFERENCES dim_network(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_raw     FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)      REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

    CONSTRAINT fk_bdt_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),

    CONSTRAINT fk_bdt_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_device_device_group (
    device_id       INT NOT NULL,
    device_group_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at     DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (device_id, device_group_id),

    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id)       REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_group  FOREIGN KEY (device_group_id) REFERENCES dim_device_group(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bddg_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)           REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_application (
    alert_id       INT NOT NULL,
    application_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id         BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at    DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, application_id),
    KEY fk_baa_app (application_id),
    KEY fk_baa_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_alert FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)       REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_app   FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES dim_application(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_baa_raw   FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)          REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_device (
    alert_id    INT NOT NULL,
    device_id   INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, device_id),
    KEY fk_bad_device (device_id),
    KEY fk_bad_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_alert  FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)  REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_device FOREIGN KEY (device_id) REFERENCES dim_device(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bad_raw    FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)    REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_device_group (
    alert_id        INT NOT NULL,
    device_group_id INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at     DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, device_group_id),
    KEY fk_badg_group (device_group_id),
    KEY fk_badg_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_alert FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)        REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_group FOREIGN KEY (device_group_id) REFERENCES dim_device_group(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_badg_raw   FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)           REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_alert_network (
    alert_id    INT NOT NULL,
    network_id  INT NOT NULL,
    raw_id      BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    observed_at DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (alert_id, network_id),
    KEY fk_ban_network (network_id),
    KEY fk_ban_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_alert   FOREIGN KEY (alert_id)   REFERENCES dim_alert(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_network FOREIGN KEY (network_id) REFERENCES dim_network(id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_ban_raw     FOREIGN KEY (raw_id)      REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
